textByHash.18583ca0c905612e1f6c6f949b9f2f454db92750: I have a letter for you. I'm told it's quite important. Please read it when you get a chance.
textByHash.397ea5fb74beaf52b22a289cdbcaa3c6e5c5c5f8: Apparently you destroyed that last letter I gave you without reading it, or something like that. The sender doesn't appreciate that sort of thing, so I've got another one for you.
textByHash.bc31df313d703d79995b3c4c584c88b50d02dc1c: Look, you can destroy that letter as many times as you want, but it won't change anything. The sender isn't the kind of individual who takes no for an answer, so for both of our sakes, please just read it.
textByHash.8c7261a11ff8c464b402eea98f2308fe8851d02e: Please... don't keep doing this. You don't know who you're dealing with...
textByHash.7cb606d35f3c66ced7df3c0ef97db6b363cd33a5: Hello there. I have a message for you.
textByHash.f0359ab68510b5b8cc1b69fcaec87c749f650209: Hello there. I have a message for you, but you'll need to make some room for it.
textByHash.957fe1fcd37d31eca7216ce79dcd6d494777937d: Sorry, I don't have anything for you right now.
textByHash.464b5ba352dd13b8d97b48112dad108ea6d61cfa: I have a message for you.
